name: Cairo American College
description: Founded in 1945, CAC is an independent, coeducational day school offering an American curriculum from Pre-K through Grade 12, with IB options in high school.

name: Modern English School Cairo
description: MES Cairo is a British Schools Overseas Outstanding School serving over 2,400 students with multi-track curricula including British, American, and IB.

name: Port Said School, Zamalek
description: A prestigious national school in Zamalek with a long history of academic excellence and a strong community feel.

name: St. Fatima Language School, Heliopolis
description: A well-established language school in Heliopolis focusing on English proficiency and strong science/math foundations.

name: Misr Language Schools
description: One of Egypt's most prestigious national schools, offering a comprehensive curriculum with a focus on modern teaching methods.

name: Manor House School, Mohandessin
description: A traditional school known for its discipline and high academic standards in the heart of Mohandessin.

name: Continental School of Cairo
description: Offers a diverse international curriculum with a focus on global citizenship and technology integration.
